How we use cookies and other data

You can change the settings at any time (fingerprint icon in the bottom left corner). For further details, please see Individual configuration and our Privacy notice.

Further information

To submit forms on this page, you need to consent to the transfer of data and storage of third-party cookies by Google. With your consent, reCAPTCHA, a Google service to avoid spam messages via contact forms, will be embedded. This service allows us to provide our customers with a safe way to contact us via online forms. At the same time, the service prevents spam bots from compromising our services. After you gave your permission, you might be asked to answer a security prompt to send the form. If you do not consent, unfortunately you cannot use the form. Please contact us in a different way.

Description:

Stopping spam bots

Processing company:

Google Inc.

Terms of use: https://policies.google.com/privacy
Further information

To send data to Brevo, you need to consent to the transfer of data and storage of third-party cookies by Brevo. This allows us to improve your user experience and to make our website better and more interesting.

Description:

Brevo Automation Tracking

Processing company:

sendinblue

Terms of use: https://sendinblue.com/legal/privacypolicy/
Further information

Google Analytics ist ein Webanalysedienst von Google Ireland Ltd („Google“). Google verwendet die erhobenen Daten, um nachzuverfolgen und zu untersuchen, wie diese Webseite/App genutzt wird, Berichte über ihre Aktivitäten zu verfassen und diese gemeinsam mit anderen Google-Diensten zu nutzen. Google kann die erhobenen Daten verwenden, um die Anzeigen seines eigenen Werbenetzwerks zu kontextualisieren und personalisieren.

Description:

Erhobene Daten: anonymisierte IP Adresse, Datum und Uhrzeit des Besuchs, Nutzungsdaten, Klickpfad, App-Aktualisierungen, Browser Informationen, Geräte-Informationen, JavaScript-Support, Besuchte Seiten, Referrer URL, Standort-Informationen, Kaufaktivität, Widget-Interaktionen

Zweck der Datenverarbeitung: Marketing (Einwilligung (DSGVO 6.1.a))

Rechtsgrundlage für die Datenverarbeitung: Einwilligung (DSGVO 6.1.a)

Datenübertragung außerhalb der EU: Dieser Anbieter kann Ihre personenbezogenen Daten außerhalb des EWR/der EU übertragen, speichern oder verarbeiten. Diese Länder haben möglicherweise nicht das gleiche Datenschutzniveau und die Durchsetzung Ihrer Rechte kann eingeschränkt oder nicht möglich sein.

Cookies, die in Ihrem Browser gesetzt werden:

Cookiename Beispielinhalt Ablaufzeit
_ga_* deleted 730 Tage
_ga GA1.1.8643343795.1726666186 730 Tage
Processing company:

Google Ireland Ltd, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4,IE

Terms of use: https://business.safety.google/privacy/
Further information

Mit dem Google Ads Conversion Tracking können wir unseren Werbeerfolg im Google Werbenetzwerk messen. Wir schalten Werbung im Google Werbenetzwerk, damit unsere Angebote besser gefunden werden. Wir versuchen dabei Werbung so optimal wie möglich zu gestalten. Auch um Werbekosten so gering wie möglich zu halten. Dies spiegelt sich in unseren Preisen wieder ;)

Description:

Erhobene Daten: zufallsgenerierte USER-ID, Klickpfad, Sichtbarkeit von Anzeigen messen, Mausbewegung, Zeitstempel, Klicks auf Anzeigen verfolgen, Conversion-Tracking, IP, Uhrzeit und Datum verfolgen, Verfolgung des Benutzerstandorts, Besucherverhalten, User-Agent, Sprache, Besuchte Webseite, Zeitzone

Zweck der Datenverarbeitung: Marketing (Einwilligung (DSGVO 6.1.a))

Rechtsgrundlage für die Datenverarbeitung: Einwilligung (DSGVO 6.1.a)

Datenübertragung außerhalb der EU: Dieser Anbieter kann Ihre personenbezogenen Daten außerhalb des EWR/der EU übertragen, speichern oder verarbeiten. Diese Länder haben möglicherweise nicht das gleiche Datenschutzniveau und die Durchsetzung Ihrer Rechte kann eingeschränkt oder nicht möglich sein.

Processing company:

Google Ireland Ltd, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4,IE

Terms of use: https://business.safety.google/privacy/

    Frequently Asked Questions

    If your order is received by 17.00, we will ship your order with DPD on the same working day (subject to stock availability). Within Austria, you will usually receive your order on the next working day. To Germany, experience shows that it takes two working days.
    As soon as your order has been packed, you will receive an email with a tracking number. This way, you always know where your package is.

    For Austria and Germany, shipping is free for orders over 40€.
    The shipping costs are different for each country. You can find the current shipping costs here: view our shipping costs

    No, there is no minimum order value for your order. Please note, however, that above a certain order value you may be able to save on shipping costs and even choose a free gift.

    We offer you a large selection of different payment options. You can currently choose from classic advance payment (bank transfer), cash on delivery, credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, EPS, Klarna Pay Now and Klarna Slice It. Depending on the payment method, you may be redirected to the provider's website for processing.

    Unfortunately, this sometimes happens. But don't panic, just send us an email with photos of the damaged item and we'll take care of an exchange / subsequent delivery immediately. This is of course free of charge for you.

    Everyone changes their mind sometimes. You can return any order to us. Please enclose enough information so that we know how to handle your return. If you would like a return label from us, our iBot can help you in our live chat. Everyone changes their mind sometimes. You can return individual items or your entire order. Please include enough information so that we can identify your order. If you would like a refund or an exchange, please let us know as well. This will speed up the return process immensely.

    What happens if I fall below the free shipping limit with the return?
    In this case, you will be charged for the shipping costs that would otherwise have been incurred, as we have to treat the order as if you had never ordered the returned products.

    Our products are professional products. These are difficult to compare with commercially available care products. Our products are used by the industry in the OEM sector. They are state-of-the-art and are continuously improved. You get absolute premium quality.

    Our products are professional products in premium quality. This means that the products are much more economical to use and require less time. This added value alone makes all products significantly cheaper than supposedly "cheap" care products.

    The materials and surfaces in vehicles are becoming more and more complex and sensitive. Our products have been specially developed for the surfaces and materials. This is the only way you can be sure that you are protecting your surfaces for a long time and not damaging them by using too aggressive cleaners. Well-preserved vehicles usually achieve a higher selling price.
